Layer3 run726 improves present_and_match 2572->2616, missing_in_system 434->395, and present_but_mismatch 168->163 vs run720 by splitting surfactant/stabilizer concentration value/unit surfaces and comparing percent concentration unit surfaces canonically; extra and not_reported unchanged.

purpose: Validate generic Stage5 DOE factor physical-value materialization on DEV15.
summary: Layer1 run728 remains 202/202 and 15/15. Layer3 run729 improves present_and_match 2616->2678, missing_in_system 395->385, and present_but_mismatch 163->111 vs run726 by decoding source-defined DOE factor level maps for WIVUCMYG/YGA8VQKU concentration and pH variables; extra and not_reported unchanged.

purpose: Validate generic table-continuation DOE factor unit recovery plus Stage5 actual-value materialization on DEV15 active lineage.
summary: Layer1 run736 remains 202/202 and 15/15. Layer3 run737 improves present_and_match 2678->2711 and missing_in_system 385->352 vs run729; 33 WFDTQ4VX drug_concentration_value/unit cells move from missing_in_system to present_and_match with mismatch, extra, and not_reported unchanged.
